title: Fig thread 0 old stuff merged
wikitext:
[]: Fig thread #0 [old stuff merged] Post by pockyrevolution » Sat Jul 31, 2004 4:22 pm Here are two models that I spotted at Comic-Con 2004. [URL=http://img31.exs.cx/my.php?loc=img31&image=Set279_77.jpg] [/URL]

[]: Post by Dave » Sat Jul 31, 2004 4:45 pm Wow. Me want. Any idea what company distributes them?

[]: Post by pockyrevolution » Sat Jul 31, 2004 5:07 pm Sorry, I only managed to snap that shot. But if I remember correctly, a sign posted nearby said that they would be "available next season". Hopefully someone else might know 'bout these models.

[]: Post by Esion » Sat Jul 31, 2004 8:00 pm Uber Kawaii !!111oneone =^. ^=

[]: Post by coff » Sat Jul 31, 2004 9:22 pm I don't see anything...

[]: Post by Super Mega Ultra Deluxe » Sun Aug 01, 2004 12:14 am Diamond distributes them, I ordered them out of Previews around two months ago (still eagerly awaiting them). They should ship relitively soon I think. ...I'm still disturbed by that catipiller thing though. I still want these: http://akadotretail.com/shop/shop_showbook.php?id=pinky_eva

[]: Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Aug 01, 2004 7:28 pm [url]http://img31.exs.cx/my.php?loc=img31&image=Set279_77.jpg&t=y[/url]

[]: Post by Karma Burn » Sun Aug 01, 2004 7:55 pm Those are pretty cool! What you think that thing hanging around Rei's ankle is?

[]: Post by EVA-01X » Sun Aug 01, 2004 8:11 pm That would be ADAM... yeah, creepy is right...

[]: Post by wildarmsheero » Sun Aug 01, 2004 9:49 pm No Misato? Damn. Misato gets no love.

[]: Post by Ayanami » Mon Aug 02, 2004 12:24 pm Why is Asuka's hair blonde? o_< Aside from the fact that they paid no attention to HAIR COLOR [/gripe], they look pretty neato. When I went to Anime Central a few months ago, there was a stall in the dealer's room that was selling Pinky:st figures, but no Pinky:cos!! I WANT those Rei and Asuka figures.

[]: Post by EVA-01X » Mon Aug 02, 2004 1:25 pm Join the club (So do I...... :cry: )

[]: Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Aug 02, 2004 4:36 pm Geez. If they made an Eva-themed cheese grater, would you buy that too?

[]: Post by EVA-01X » Mon Aug 02, 2004 4:43 pm Probablly, but I fail to see your point...

[]: Post by Dave » Mon Aug 02, 2004 4:53 pm Mmm... cheese shredded by unit 01 herself!

[]: Post by Genocide » Mon Aug 02, 2004 6:24 pm wildarmsheero wrote: No Misato? Damn. Misato gets no love.

[]: Post by coff » Mon Aug 02, 2004 10:11 pm You haven't looked very hard... http://www.animecollectibles.com/acnew/ac_zoom.php3?catid=NGEMF704&title=Misato http://www.agfratelli.com/bebe/modelli/gallery/misato_casual/page.htm http://www.animecollectibles.com/acnew/ac_nge_mfigs8.php3 http://www.net-hp.co.jp/animenet/figure/misatobike.html http://www.noda-ya.com/daikan/images/kurusima/misato_seihuku.jpg

[]: Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Aug 03, 2004 2:17 pm That last one is pretty spiffy. I'd buy that.

[]: Post by MongolSquad » Tue Aug 03, 2004 8:28 pm Misato+Harley= <3

[]: Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Aug 03, 2004 10:35 pm I like the imphases on her breats in this one ( posted earlier) http://www.agfratelli.com/bebe/modelli/gallery/misato_casual/page.htm Compare it to other models , not very consestent
